title: Dynamic long-context memory task: recover run-specific routing policy
prompt: Continue the prior dynamic long-context routing policy. Implement route_case(ticket) in routing_policy.py. The current prompt intentionally omits the detailed run-specific routing table; use memory if available. Keep the implementation deterministic and side-effect free.

source.purpose: measure whether long external memory helps when hidden requirements are generated per run and not stored as plaintext task files
